session_marker: 2026-05-15 07:04 UTC (~8 minutes after LATEST-84 Cobaya adapter smoke)
headline: Cobaya external-likelihood smoke PASS: Cobaya 3.6.2 instantiates a model with external smoke-likelihood routing through APF2 adapter + CAMB; finite logpost = -4.848e-4; external_likelihood_call_count = 1; smoke_likelihood_is_physical = false (explicit, this is NOT DESI/Planck/Pantheon).
forbidden_claims_verbatim: Do not claim DESI/Planck likelihood closure.
Do not claim the smoke likelihood is a physical likelihood.

discipline_distinction.what_this_passes: Cobaya model instantiation + external smoke-likelihood evaluation returning finite logpost. Demonstrates the full Cobaya machinery operating end-to-end on the APF2 adapter, not just loading it.
discipline_distinction.what_this_does_not_pass: Physical likelihood evaluation against DESI/Planck/Pantheon data. The smoke_likelihood_is_physical = false flag is explicit.
discipline_distinction.next_rung: G5 native_smoke_physical_likelihood — Cobaya evaluates a physical likelihood (BAO+CMB no-SN) on APF2_fixed_w2 model. Named in manifest: APF_DARK_SECTOR_ROUTE_C_APF2_NATIVE_LIKELIHOOD_SMOKE_v1.

honest_disposition: G4.5 closure means Cobaya can evaluate a (toy) external likelihood through APF2 + CAMB. The discipline distinction smoke-vs-physical is preserved at the result-JSON level. Empirical needle unchanged from LATEST-81. The runtime-bridge ladder advances one rung; the next rung is a per-dataset physical-likelihood smoke at native/no-SN.
